creator: numisemis@yahoo.com
text:
----- Original Message ----
> From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
> To: numisemis@yahoo.com
> Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
> Sent: Tue, August 3, 2010 1:50:15 PM
> Subject: Re: ports/149233: Update port: net/p5-Net-SFTP-Foreign
> 
> Maintainer of net/p5-Net-SFTP-Foreign,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/149233  has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an  enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you  approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.


Patch looks fine by me (maintainer).
